ns0:entry.ns0:title: AkashSingh3031/The-Complete-FAANG-Preparation
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AkashSingh3031/The-Complete-FAANG-Preparation
Language: jupyter-notebook
Dive into this repository, a comprehensive resource covering Data Structures, Algorithms, 450 DSA by Love Babbar, Striver DSA sheet, Apna College DSA Sheet, and FAANG Questions! 🚀 That's not all! We've got Technical Subjects like Operating Systems, DBMS, SQL, Computer Networks, and Object-Oriented Programming, all waiting for you.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ArcInstitute/evo2
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ArcInstitute/evo2
Language: jupyter-notebook
Genome modeling and design across all domains of life

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Azure-Samples/AI-Gateway
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Azure-Samples/AI-Gateway
Language: jupyter-notebook
Labs to explore AI Models, MCP servers, and Agents with the AI Gateway powered by Azure API Management and Microsoft Foundry 🚀

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GokuMohandas/Made-With-ML
Language: jupyter-notebook
Learn how to develop, deploy and iterate on production-grade ML applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/GoogleCloudPlatform/generative-ai
Language: jupyter-notebook
Sample code and notebooks for Generative AI on Google Cloud, with Gemini on Vertex AI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: InternRobotics/InternNav
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/InternRobotics/InternNav
Language: jupyter-notebook
InternRobotics' open platform for building generalized navigation foundation models.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Liquid4All/cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Liquid4All/cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Examples, end-2-end tutorials and apps built using Liquid AI Foundational Models (LFM) and the LEAP SDK

ns0:entry.ns0:title: NVIDIA/Isaac-GR00T
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/NVIDIA/Isaac-GR00T
Language: jupyter-notebook
NVIDIA Isaac GR00T N1.6 - A Foundation Model for Generalist Robots.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: QwenLM/Qwen3-Omni
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-Omni
Language: jupyter-notebook
Qwen3-omni is a natively end-to-end, omni-modal LLM developed by the Qwen team at Alibaba Cloud, capable of understanding text, audio, images, and video, as well as generating speech in real time.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ageron/handson-ml3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ageron/handson-ml3
Language: jupyter-notebook
A series of Jupyter notebooks that walk you through the fundamentals of Machine Learning and Deep Learning in Python using Scikit-Learn, Keras and TensorFlow 2.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: alphacep/vosk-api
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/alphacep/vosk-api
Language: jupyter-notebook
Offline speech recognition API for Android, iOS, Raspberry Pi and servers with Python, Java, C# and Node

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ed-donner/llm_engineering
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ed-donner/llm_engineering
Language: jupyter-notebook
Repo to accompany my mastering LLM engineering course

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/dinov3
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/dinov3
Language: jupyter-notebook
Reference PyTorch implementation and models for DINOv3

ns0:entry.ns0:title: facebookresearch/segment-anything
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/facebookresearch/segment-anything
Language: jupyter-notebook
The repository provides code for running inference with the SegmentAnything Model (SAM), links for downloading the trained model checkpoints, and example notebooks that show how to use the model.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: karpathy/micrograd
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/karpathy/micrograd
Language: jupyter-notebook
A tiny scalar-valued autograd engine and a neural net library on top of it with PyTorch-like API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: openai/openai-cookbook
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/openai/openai-cookbook
Language: jupyter-notebook
Examples and guides for using the OpenAI API

ns0:entry.ns0:title: patchy631/ai-engineering-hub
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/patchy631/ai-engineering-hub
Language: jupyter-notebook
In-depth tutorials on LLMs, RAGs and real-world AI agent applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: wilsonfreitas/awesome-quant
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/wilsonfreitas/awesome-quant
Language: jupyter-notebook
A curated list of insanely awesome libraries, packages and resources for Quants (Quantitative Finance)
